title: Shrooms
body:
![Shrooms logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04a6c730681730e73bd59da5832a6edc5ba0dc3b_0.webp)


Shrooms adds a layer of magical transitive energy to the game. Through the Codex Mycelium it is possible to access methods to manipulate this energy. An spontaneous unexpected nap might soothe one's mind

For now, you can learn how to do magic, decompose items, and do rituals that control the weather and time
